name: @supermajia/majia-guanyuan
description: Tool-agnostic Agent Skill for Guandata BI (观远 BI). Five capabilities — Part A data query & card creation / Part B ETL governance & write (incl. SmartETL full-chain rewrite + ExecPlan) / Part C custom chart HTML+CSS+JS injection & debugging / Part C-12 HTML application-style dashboard (SDK + DATA_GRID dataView + descriptor-level selector linkage patch) / Part D V7 Page/Card publish pipeline + 3-state hard rules + SmartETL node-level silent traps + customChart autoBootstrap + chip toolbar fallback + mobile phoneLayout ZIP-inject. Compatible with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Hermes (gbrain). V2.1.10 (2026-05-21): NEW §16 mobile phoneLayout complete guide (~330 lines) — v7 BI has NO callable draft save REST API (8 endpoints all stub/404), the only working path is `guanvis-skill pack` → Python inject phoneLayout into `page.meta` JSON string → `guanvis-skill upload` via transfer API directly overwrites published page; phoneLayout five-field structure with selector `group_AUTO_PHONE` container, mobileHeightUnit:60, customChart h=40 ≈ 572px; CSS @media 768px KPI 4→2 col + `html,body { height:auto }` to unlock iOS scroll. V2.1.9: NEW §15 customChart three traps + autoBootstrap + chip toolbar fallback. V2.1.8: NEW §14 SmartETL node-level GROUP_BY STRING COUNT_DISTINCT silently swapped to NUL + JOIN_DATA only honors predicates[0] + FULL_OUTER silently downgraded. V2.1.7: routing/triggering refresh. V2.1.6: NEW references/v7-page-card-publish-pipeline.md — 12 pitfalls from end-to-end demo. V2.1.5: NEW references/restaurant-bi-formulas/ — fully-anonymized restaurant-chain BI formula playbook (10 markdown files, 2881 lines, 60+ SQL snippets + 6 ETL engineering patterns + 39 production ETL catalog index). V2.1.4: command surface synced with @guandata/guancli 1.0.21. V2.1.1: HTML application-style dashboard generation (Part C-12). V2.1.0: @guandata/guanvis-skill@0.1.13 internal-Nexus rollout. V2.0.0: renamed from guanyuan-majia. V1.5.0: progressive-disclosure architecture saves ~1.2万 tokens per invocation.
author: maojiebc
